# aikido_domain (Resource)

Manages a domain in Aikido Security for surface monitoring and DAST scanning.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Frontend domain
resource "aikido_domain" "website" {
  domain = "example.com"
  kind   = "front_end"
}

# REST API with OpenAPI spec
resource "aikido_domain" "api" {
  domain           = "api.example.com"
  kind             = "rest_api"
  openapi_spec_url = "https://api.example.com/openapi.json"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name (e.g., `example.com`).
- `kind` (String) The type of domain: `front_end`, `rest_api`, or `graphql_api`.

### Optional

- `openapi_spec_url` (String) URL to a JSON OpenAPI spec. Only applicable for `rest_api` or `graphql_api` kinds.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the domain.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import a domain by its ID
terraform import aikido_domain.website "123"
```
